code: import axios from'axios';const API_URL='http://localhost:8080/api/auth';const login=async(email,password)=>{const response=await axios.post("".concat(API_URL,"/login"),{email,password});if(response.data.token){localStorage.setItem('user',JSON.stringify(response.data));}return response.data;};const register=async(name,email,password,role)=>{const response=await axios.post("".concat(API_URL,"/register"),{name,email,password,role});if(response.data.token){localStorage.setItem('user',JSON.stringify(response.data));}return response.data;};const logout=()=>{localStorage.removeItem('user');};const getCurrentUser=()=>{return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('user'));};const authService={login,register,logout,getCurrentUser};export default authService;
